scripts.dev: pnpm --filter context-engine db:push && pnpm --filter context-engine build && pnpm --parallel --filter backend --filter frontend dev
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm --filter context-engine db:push && pnpm --filter context-engine build && pnpm --filter backend dev
scripts.build:backend: pnpm --filter context-engine build && pnpm --filter backend build
